mapper.select:
select rel.rel_id as relId, stu.sid as sid, stu.sname as sname, stu.classname as className, build.id as buildId, build.building_name as buildingName, rel.score as score, rel.visit_time as visitTime
from student_build_rel rel
join shanxi_ancient_student stu on rel.sid = stu.sid
join sx_ancient_buildings build on rel.build_id = build.id
rel.is_delete = 0 and stu.is_delete = 0 and build.is_deleted = 0
and ( stu.sname like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or build.building_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
and stu.classname like '%' || #{classname} || '%'
and build.area_code like #{areaCode}
and trunc(rel.visit_time)=trunc(#{visitTime})
order by rel.visit_time desc
